content:
Would you trust an AI to refactor thousands of lines of your codebase?
Curious if AI can actually refactor your Python code better than you? I ran a real experiment — and the results were anything but expected.

1 min read
Just now

--

I meant it as a joke.
One day, feeling frustrated with old code and stuck in utility.py, I wondered, What if I just handed this whole project to an AI and let it figure things out?

After giving it a few prompts and commands, I sat back to watch GPT-4o rewrite my year-old Python codebase, almost like a robotic Marie Kondo. What began as a simple experiment quickly got out of control and turned into an eye-opening, sometimes painful, lesson in how much progress AI has made — and how much further it still needs to go.
So, what really happens when you let AI rewrite your whole Python project?
Here’s what I found — the good, the bad, and the surprisingly helpful.
